body: organizing this meaningful event. I also extend a warm welcome to all distinguished participants, including Sir Martin Sorrell, chairman of S4 Capital, and James Kim, chairman and CEO of the American Chamber of Commerce in Korea (AMCHAM). Today, the world stands in a whirlwind of profound transformation.…

title: Is our talent pipeline ready for the AI economy? Not in the way we think
summary: Ask most organisations in Southeast Asia whether they are investing in AI readiness, and the answer is yes.…
body: Ask whether that investment is actually producing people who can work differently because of AI — and the answer becomes much harder to give. This is the gap I keep running into.
